name: Build
description: Implementation strategy. The user describes work to do, often referencing a Plan strategy todo list; the coder implements changes and the tester observes each iteration until implementation, tests, and configured project checks are approved. The final output is the accepted coder summary.

coder.description: Implements code changes using filesystem and command tools, revising when the tester provides a CONTINUE directive.

tester.description: Cycle observer. Validates the coder's implementation by inspecting changed code, checking test quality, running configured verification commands, and approving only when the work is ready.

flow.name: Build Flow
flow.description: User describes the work; coder implements and revises under tester observation until the tester approves. The cycle returns the accepted coder summary.

steps.name: Build Approval Loop
steps.description: Coder implements; tester observes and either approves with a first-line token or sends one concrete revision directive.
